title: Near net shape additive manufacturing
abstract: An additive manufacturing apparatus includes a first vertically- extending support leg (85), a second vertically-extending support leg (86), and a gantry (26) supported on the first and second support legs (85, 86). The additive manufacturing apparatus also includes a work table (27) movably supported beneath the gantry (26), a print head (43) supported on the gantry (26), and a trim head (90 supported on the gantry (26) with the print head (43).
